daily.name: msitarzewski /agency-agents
daily.description: A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.

daily.name: TheCraigHewitt /seomachine
daily.description: A specialized Claude Code workspace for creating long-form, SEO-optimized blog content for any business. This system helps you research, write, analyze, and optimize content that ranks well and serves your target audience.

daily.name: KeygraphHQ /shannon
daily.description: Shannon Lite is a fully autonomous AI pentester for web apps and APIs. 96.15% (100/104 exploits) on a hint-free, source-aware variant of the XBOW benchmark.

daily.name: aquasecurity /trivy
daily.description: Find vulnerabilities, misconfigurations, secrets, SBOM in containers, Kubernetes, code repositories, clouds and more

daily.name: moeru-ai /airi
daily.description: 💖🧸 Self hosted, you-owned Grok Companion, a container of souls of waifu, cyber livings to bring them into our worlds, wishing to achieve Neuro-sama's altitude. Capable of realtime voice chat, Minecraft, Factorio playing. Web / macOS / Windows supported.

daily.name: inclusionAI /AReaL
daily.description: Lightning-Fast RL for LLM Reasoning and Agents. Made Simple & Flexible.

daily.name: microsoft /mcp-for-beginners
daily.description: This open-source curriculum introduces the fundamentals of Model Context Protocol (MCP) through real-world, cross-language examples in .NET, Java, TypeScript, JavaScript, Rust and Python. Designed for developers, it focuses on practical techniques for building modular, scalable, and secure AI workflows from session setup to service orchestration.

daily.name: FujiwaraChoki /MoneyPrinterV2
daily.description: Automate the process of making money online.

daily.name: agentscope-ai /ReMe
daily.description: ReMe: Memory Management Kit for Agents - Remember Me, Refine Me.

daily.name: microsoft /hve-core
daily.description: A refined collection of Hypervelocity Engineering components (instructions, prompts, agents) to start your project off right, or upgrade your existing projects to get the most out of all Copilots

weekly.name: ruvnet /RuView
weekly.description: π RuView: WiFi DensePose turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time human pose estimation, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.

weekly.name: alibaba /OpenSandbox
weekly.description: OpenSandbox is a general-purpose sandbox platform for AI applications, offering multi-language SDKs, unified sandbox APIs, and Docker/Kubernetes runtimes for scenarios like Coding Agents, GUI Agents, Agent Evaluation, AI Code Execution, and RL Training.

weekly.name: abhigyanpatwari /GitNexus
weekly.description: GitNexus: The Zero-Server Code Intelligence Engine - GitNexus is a client-side knowledge graph creator that runs entirely in your browser. Drop in a GitHub repo or ZIP file, and get an interactive knowledge graph wit a built in Graph RAG Agent. Perfect for code exploration

weekly.name: bytedance /deer-flow
weekly.description: An open-source SuperAgent harness that researches, codes, and creates. With the help of sandboxes, memories, tools, skills and subagents, it handles different levels of tasks that could take minutes to hours.

weekly.name: D4Vinci /Scrapling
weekly.description: 🕷️ An adaptive Web Scraping framework that handles everything from a single request to a full-scale crawl!

weekly.name: shareAI-lab /learn-claude-code
weekly.description: Bash is all you need - A nano Claude Code–like agent, built from 0 to 1

monthly.description: OpenViking is an open-source context database designed specifically for AI Agents(such as openclaw).
